description: 乐观复古好感。半色调网点，复古丝带横幅，美好生活叙事。
base_style_prompt: 1950s vintage advertisement style. Cream white (#FFF8E7), vintage red (#C0392B), mint green (#1ABC9C), warm brown-gold (#8B6914). Optimistic American illustration. Halftone dot patterns. Vintage ribbon banners. Good-life narrative. Nostalgic warmth with contemporary production quality.
